description: User clicks on the flight option to view available fare types (Lite, Choice)
frame_description: The user selects a specific flight time to expand the fare options.

description: Fare options (Lite, Choice) are displayed for the selected flight
frame_description: The UI updates to show different baggage and change policy options for the selected flight.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option
frame_description: The 'SELECT' button for the $127 Lite fare turns green with a checkmark, indicating it has been clicked.

description: The page transitions to the return flight selection screen after a brief loading state
frame_description: A 'Good choice!' loading overlay appears before the return flight options are loaded.

description: User dwells on the 'Select Return Flight' page, reviewing available flights from Melbourne to Adelaide
frame_description: The user pauses to examine the list of return flights and their prices.
